panels.title: Main website probe status
panels.description: Requires blackbox_exporter scraping the public main host. The repo does not include blackbox configuration.

panels.title: Grafana probe status
panels.description: Requires blackbox_exporter scraping the Grafana public host.

panels.title: caddy.service active
panels.description: Requires node_exporter systemd collector metrics.

panels.title: conorganizer-main.service active
panels.description: Requires node_exporter systemd collector metrics. Service name comes from configuration-as-code/stow/systemd.

panels.title: SQLite backup fresh
panels.description: Counts successful SQLite backup log lines in the last 2 hours. The timer runs every 15 minutes in the checked-in systemd config.

panels.title: Image backup fresh
panels.description: Counts successful image backup log lines in the last 26 hours. The checked-in timer runs daily at 03:30.

panels.title: SQLite backup logs
panels.description: Uses backup script prefixes from configuration-as-code/stow/scripts/usr/local/bin/conorganizer-sqlite-backup.

panels.title: Image backup logs
panels.description: Uses backup script prefixes from configuration-as-code/stow/scripts/usr/local/bin/conorganizer-images-backup.

panels.title: Backup failure logs
panels.description: Broad backup failure search using the known backup script prefixes and failure text.

targets.expr: {job=~"$loki_job"} |= "conorganizer-" |~ "failed|does not exist|sanity check failed|integrity check failed"

panels.title: Optional: SQLite backup age
panels.description: Optional future metric. Requires a textfile collector, script-emitted metric, or custom exporter.

panels.title: Optional: Image backup age
panels.description: Optional future metric. Requires a textfile collector, script-emitted metric, or custom exporter.

panels.title: Optional: Backup directory size
panels.description: Optional future metric for /mnt/HC_Volume_103911252/backups/sqlite and /mnt/HC_Volume_103911252/backups/images. node_exporter filesystem metrics do not expose per-directory size.

panels.title: Root filesystem usage
panels.description: Requires node_exporter filesystem collector.

panels.title: Mounted volume usage
panels.description: Requires node_exporter filesystem metrics for the Hetzner mounted volume.

panels.title: Root inode usage
panels.description: Requires node_exporter filesystem collector.

panels.title: Mounted volume inode usage
panels.description: Requires node_exporter filesystem metrics for /mnt/HC_Volume_103911252.

panels.title: Mounted volume available bytes
panels.description: Available bytes on the Hetzner mounted volume.

panels.title: CPU usage
panels.description: Requires node_exporter CPU metrics.

panels.title: Memory usage
panels.description: Requires node_exporter memory metrics.

panels.title: Load average
panels.description: Requires node_exporter load metrics.

panels.title: Network receive rate
panels.description: Requires node_exporter network metrics.

panels.title: Network transmit rate
panels.description: Requires node_exporter network metrics.

panels.title: Optional: SQLite DB file size
panels.description: Optional future metric for /mnt/HC_Volume_103911252/environments/main/database/events.db. Requires textfile collector, script-emitted metric, or custom exporter.

panels.title: Optional: SQLite WAL file size
panels.description: Optional future metric for the SQLite WAL file. Requires textfile collector, script-emitted metric, or custom exporter.

panels.title: Optional: SQLite backup size trend
panels.description: Optional future metric for compressed SQLite backup file sizes under /mnt/HC_Volume_103911252/backups/sqlite.

panels.title: SQLite error logs
panels.description: Broad Loki fallback for SQLite/database symptoms in app and backup logs.

panels.title: Days until main TLS expiry
panels.description: Requires blackbox_exporter TLS probing for the main host. Alert candidate: less than 14 days.

panels.title: Days until Grafana TLS expiry
panels.description: Requires blackbox_exporter TLS probing for the Grafana host. Alert candidate: less than 14 days.

panels.title: HTTP probe duration
panels.description: Requires blackbox_exporter HTTP probing.

panels.title: HTTP probe status code
panels.description: Requires blackbox_exporter HTTP probing. If this metric is not present, use probe_success panels above.

panels.title: Recent Caddy errors
panels.description: Broad Caddy-related error search. If Promtail exposes systemd unit labels, narrow this to caddy.service.

panels.title: Recent systemd/service failures
panels.description: Broad systemd failure search for services, including conorganizer-main.service.

targets.expr: {job=~"$loki_job"} |~ "Failed to start|failed with result|Start request repeated too quickly|conorganizer-main.service"

panels.title: Recent Loki/Promtail errors
panels.description: Useful for checking ingestion path failures.

panels.title: Recent critical logs
panels.description: Broad critical log search across ingested logs.

targets.expr: {job=~"$loki_job"} |~ "panic|fatal|critical|segfault|out of memory|OOM|No space left on device"
